Notes on measurements: Femur incomplete. Original caliper measurements for zeugopodia inaccurate (didn't follow current measurement scheme) so omitted.
A "Caliper2" measurement set, originally taken 7/20/21,  replaced by remeasurements on 10/28/21.
Left and right zeugoautopods available for additional Bland-Altman if needed.
Measured bottom zeugoautopod shown in photograph. Scaled assuming NYC metrocard length = 85.7mm.
Downward-facing protuberance taken as internal trochantter (trochanter minor of Romer, p. 364). This is what I've done for all turtles. For Humerus, Preaxial process is the smaller one in turtles.
Best skull of all CM Claudiosaurus_specimens.

Radius measurement difficult to obtain, and the position of the lateralmost point of distal epiphysis seemed arbitrary. Could be forelimb or hindlimb. Assumed forelimb. (NOTE: For acropod, equivalent digital measurement instead. This one started from the wrong acropodial bone.)
Measurement set was composite from part and counterpart.
For femur, not sure if internal trochanter present, since probably ventral. So just did proxmost point along anterior margin to distmost point along same margin.

Measured longest digit (D1) for both hand and foot. Acropod measurements underestimated true length by excluding unguals, which were missing from this specimen (and of course not used in this measurement scheme).

NB: Some original length measurements were rounded to nearest mm (and unrounded versions not recorded). These already-rounded length measurements were set here to “NA”. Measured D3 for both hand and foot, excluding unguals as in other clawed amniotes. Tibia measurement difficult. Femur and hand too incomplete to measure.

NB: Some original length measurements were rounded to nearest mm (and unrounded versions not recorded). These already-rounded length measurements were set here to “NA”. Measured mD3 for hand, excluding unguals for all acropod measurements as in other clawed amniotes. Digit identities following Osborn 1917.

NB: Some original length measurements were rounded to nearest mm (and unrounded versions not recorded). These already-rounded length measurements were set here to “NA”. Articulated right forelimb from disarticulated element casts following Carpenter et al. 2005 (Tanycolagreus) and YPM element labels. Right mD3 ungual was missing or mis-labeled as left mD3 ungual, so I used the left mD3 ungual in its place. Measured mD3 for hand, excluding ungual as in other clawed amniotes. Note that D2 was much longer, so D3 underestimates actual hand length.
Ungual_measurement_notes: Measured left mD3 ungual. No keratinous sheaths preserved of course.
